display_information.name: SobatHQ
display_information.description: Your AI Chief of Staff for modern work. Prioritizes emails, summarizes updates, tracks workflows, and suggests next actions — all with your approval.
display_information.long_description:
SobatHQ connects to your Gmail, Calendar, Slack, Drive, and Sheets to understand your work across applications.

It proactively:
• Prioritizes emails
• Summarizes important updates
• Tracks ongoing workflows
• Drafts responses
• Prepares reports
• Remembers your preferences
• Suggests the next best actions

Every important action is presented for approval before execution, keeping you in control.

Ask Sobat: "What's important today?" and get a daily briefing with suggested actions.

slash_commands.description: Ask SobatHQ what's important or request an action
